is the national under-17 [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") team of [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium") and is controlled by the [Belgian Football Association](/wiki/Belgian_Football_Association "Belgian Football Association"). The team competes in the [UEFA European Under-17 Championship](/wiki/UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "UEFA European Under-17 Championship") and the [FIFA U-17 World Cup](/wiki/FIFA_U-17_World_Cup "FIFA U-17 World Cup"). Their biggest successes have been their bronze medal at the [2015 World Cup](/wiki/2015_FIFA_U-17_World_Cup "2015 FIFA U-17 World Cup"), reaching the semi-finals of the European championship in [2007](/wiki/2007_UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "2007 UEFA European Under-17 Championship") on home soil, and again in [2015](/wiki/2015_UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "2015 UEFA European Under-17 Championship") and [2018](/wiki/2018_UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "2018 UEFA European Under-17 Championship").

The **Belgium national under-17 football team** is the national under-17 [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") team of [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium") and is controlled by the [Belgian Football Association](/wiki/Belgian_Football_Association "Belgian Football Association"). The team competes in the [UEFA European Under-17 Championship](/wiki/UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "UEFA European Under-17 Championship") and the [FIFA U-17 World Cup](/wiki/FIFA_U-17_World_Cup "FIFA U-17 World Cup"). Their biggest successes have been their bronze medal at the [2015 World Cup](/wiki/2015_FIFA_U-17_World_Cup "2015 FIFA U-17 World Cup"), reaching the semi-finals of the European championship in [2007](/wiki/2007_UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "2007 UEFA European Under-17 Championship") on home soil, and again in [2015](/wiki/2015_UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "2015 UEFA European Under-17 Championship") and [2018](/wiki/2018_UEFA_European_Under-17_Championship "2018 UEFA European Under-17 Championship").
